name: Pharmacy and Poisons Board (PPB)
address: Lenana Road, opposite Department of Defence, P.O. Box 27663-00506, Nairobi

provenance.source: Pharmacy and Poisons Board official website
provenance.notes: IMPORTANT: The PPB is a drug regulatory authority, NOT a dedicated poison emergency hotline. Kenya does not currently have a 24/7 poison control center or poison information hotline equivalent to the US 1-800-222-1222. For poisoning emergencies, call 999 or 112 (general emergency) or 1199 (Kenya Red Cross) and proceed to the nearest hospital emergency department. The PPB is included here as the authoritative body for poisons regulation and pharmacovigilance reporting.
